name: hard-bug
description: Hard-bug investigation using the 6-phase diagnose methodology — feedback loop construction, reproduction, ranked hypothesis testing, instrumentation, fix at the correct seam, and post-mortem with architectural handoff.

steps.description: Explore the codebase to understand the bug context and gather initial information.
Execute the 6-phase diagnose methodology: build feedback loop → reproduce → rank hypotheses → instrument → fix + regression test → cleanup + post-mortem.
Implement the fix at the correct seam, add regression coverage, and rerun the failing checks.
Verify the fix addressed the regression without introducing new issues.
Capture the incident lesson: root-cause category, correct seam used, architectural handoff recommendation if any.
